# P2W INTERPLUS GROUP

> ศูนย์รวมบริการครบวงจรระดับพรีเมียม — วิศวกรรม ที่ปรึกษา ขายสินค้า คอนเทนต์ และประกันภัย ภายใต้แบรนด์เดียว

## About

P2W INTERPLUS CO.,LTD. is a Thai multi-service company offering engineering, business consulting, retail commerce, content creation / influencer services, and insurance brokerage — all under one brand. The company operates with a "Product Hub" model where customers choose the service they need from a central landing page.

## Services

- [วิศวกรรม (Engineering)](/engineer): Full-cycle engineering services — design, project supervision, and technical consulting by professional engineers.
- [ที่ปรึกษา (Consulting)](/consult): Marketing strategy and website development consulting to help businesses grow in the digital era.
- [ขายสินค้า (Commerce)](/shop): Retail products across three categories — fresh/frozen food, pet food & supplies, and automotive accessories.
- [คอนเทนต์/อินฟลูเอนเซอร์ (Content & Influencer)](/review): Content creation, product reviews, and influencer services with transparency and integrity.
- [ประกันภัย (Insurance)](/insurance): Insurance brokerage — compare plans and find the best coverage for individuals and businesses.
- [โมดิฟายรถ / Remap](https://www.shiftupperformance.com/): ECU remapping and car tuning by specialists. No wire splicing, warranty-safe, mobile service available. (External partner site)

## Tech Stack

Static site — HTML + Tailwind CSS CDN + Vanilla JavaScript. Hosted on GitHub Pages with Cloudflare DNS.
